docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,060.00 FILED BY KRIEG, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT CRAIGLIST, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF LEFT AFTER BEING TOLD HE COULD NOT HAVE A HEARING WITHOUT PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
